code:
value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

let apple = Item(name: "apple", price: 120)
let bread = Item(name: "bread", price: 300)
let cheese = Item(name: "cheese", price: 480)

let subtotal = apple.price + bread.price + cheese.price

let total = if subtotal >= 500
  subtotal - 100
else
  subtotal
end

print("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
print("total=#{total}")
